name: Magnolia Pines
overview: Drama set in the fictional Blue Ridge Mountain town of Magnolia Pines NC. The Beaumont family navigates love, loss, and the secrets of small-town life across generations.

name: Gilmore Girls
overview: A close mother and daughter duo living in the quirky town of Stars Hollow Connecticut navigate relationships, college, and life.

name: Gilmore Girls: A Year in the Life
overview: Lorelai and Rory Gilmore return to Stars Hollow for four seasons-in-a-day episodes covering a year in their lives.

name: When Calls the Heart
overview: A young teacher from a prominent family discovers love and purpose in a small coal-mining town in the Canadian frontier.

name: Heartland
overview: A family drama about life on a horse ranch in rural Alberta through the eyes of young Amy Fleming.

name: Virgin River
overview: A nurse practitioner moves from Los Angeles to a remote northern California town and finds more than she bargained for.

name: Cedar Cove
overview: A judge in a small Pacific Northwest town dispenses wisdom and discovers love while navigating the personal lives of the people around her.

name: Dolly Parton's Coat of Many Colors (Limited Series)
overview: An expanded television retelling of Dolly Parton's childhood in rural Appalachia, exploring her family and the community that shaped her.

name: Anne with an E
overview: A spirited orphan girl with a fierce imagination and great courage faces the challenges of growing up in Prince Edward Island.

name: Outlander
overview: A WWII nurse is transported back in time to 18th century Scotland, where she is torn between her life in 1945 and an adventurous Scottish warrior.

name: Chesapeake Shores
overview: The O'Brien family navigates life and love in the charming small town of Chesapeake Shores on the Maryland coast.

name: Magnolia Pines: Season 2
overview: The Beaumont family in Magnolia Pines NC faces a new set of challenges when long-lost family members arrive and old secrets resurface.

name: Grace and Frankie
overview: Two women find themselves unlikely best friends when their husbands announce they are in love with each other.

name: Longmire
overview: A dedicated, old-fashioned Wyoming sheriff fights to rebuild his life after his wife's death while solving crimes.

name: Hart of Dixie
overview: A New York doctor moves to tiny Bluebell Alabama to work in a practice, finding community and love in the charming small town.

name: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
overview: A team of postal investigators solve mysteries connected to undelivered letters while navigating their own relationships.

name: Sweet Magnolias
overview: Three best friends from South Carolina lean on each other as they navigate love, family, and new business ventures in their hometown.

name: Good Witch
overview: A charming woman with an inexplicable knack for helping the people around her runs a bed and breakfast in a cozy town.

name: North and South (1985)
overview: A sweeping saga of friendship between two families from opposite sides of the Civil War era North and South.

name: Magnolia Pines: Season 3
overview: The Beaumont family legacy is threatened by outside forces in the most dramatic season yet of the beloved Blue Ridge Mountain drama.
